nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the northern area of Naples, specifically in Marano di Napoli.
Camorra clan; Raffaele Abbinante was originally an affiliate.

aliases: clan di spacciatori capeggiato da Paolo Di Lauro
nodes.context: Camorra drug trafficking clan led by Paolo Di Lauro; the Abbinante brothers were top members before joining the 'Spagnoli' group.
Splinter group from the Di Lauro clan; Francesco Abbinante sided with them.

edges.context: Raffaele Abbinante was originally an affiliate of the Nuvoletta clan.
The Abbinante brothers were top members of the Di Lauro clan before joining the 'Spagnoli' group.
Francesco Abbinante sided with the Scissionisti, a splinter group from the Di Lauro clan.
The Scissionisti are a splinter group from the Di Lauro clan, indicating a hostile split.
